title: Designing a 3D Molecule Model
scenario: Create a precise 3D molecular model of the benzene molecule, highlighting its double-bonded carbon atoms and including a detailed description of the molecule's geometry and properties. The prompt must include accurate chemical formulas and precise spatial coordinates.
constraints: Must include interactive visualizations for rotation and zooming
Must be rendered in a standard molecular modeling software like Avogadro

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated UI adheres to all constraints.
Evaluates the accuracy of chemical formulas and molecular geometry.
Verifies the precision and accuracy of spatial coordinates for carbon atoms.
Checks the quality and interactivity of the 3D visualization.
